headline: Crowe LLP and KKR & Co. (KKR) Announce an Agreement
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 11, Crowe LLP and KKR announced an agreement, wherein the funds managed by KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) will make a significant equity investment in Crowe Advisory LLC. KKR will invest in Crowe Advisory LLC via its North America Fund […]
